full_text: Despite increasing security challenges, #Taiwan has worked to maintain peace & stability in the region, while safeguarding our democracy & strengthening resilience. No matter the threats we face, Taiwan will continue to contribute to the world & stand up for democracy. https://t.co/eQ56O0FFrw

Returning to my alma mater LSE, I spoke about how #Taiwan has contributed to secure supply chains & continually enhanced its competitiveness, in spite of the challenges in its way. Today, Taiwan is a critical link in the global economy & a key factor in technological advancement. https://t.co/jXZQDnkgOn

小林鷹之先生@kobahawkと再会でき、大変嬉しく思います。
議論における真摯な姿勢と確固たる信念に触れ、まさに「有志有途」を体現する政治家だと改めておもいました。
また有意義な意見交換ができる日を楽しみにしています。今後の更なるご活躍を期待しています！ https://t.co/zRaWNZFW3f

With resilient people & a steadfast commitment to democratic values, Taiwan has shown that democracy can survive & thrive, even in the face of constant threats. We will continue to work with our friends in the international community to ensure that democracy endures.
🎥 https://t.co/EB6uuU4wiZ

In this time of global change & uncertainty, one thing remains clear: democracy & resilience are the foundation of a better tomorrow. #Taiwan is proof of this, & we remain unwavering in our commitment to democracy, despite the challenges we face.
🎥 Copenhagen Democracy Summit https://t.co/9JZ1YdFHd4

Grateful to @FAPA_HQ for bringing this year's cohort of emerging leaders to #Taiwan to experience our country first hand. It was a pleasure to engage with such an impressive group of young people on pressing global issues & the importance of safeguarding democracy. https://t.co/BoQyzmUkeK

Going back to my alma mater LSE was a very special moment for me. It was a privilege to address students & faculty about changing international dynamics, especially in trade, & how democratic #Taiwan remains globally indispensable in these times of uncertainty. https://t.co/4uIRf1sop9

Speaking at the University of Cambridge, I shared my thoughts on the challenges facing the world & what #Taiwan is doing to strengthen its resilience & safeguard its democracy. I thoroughly enjoyed engaging with students & faculty on these important topics. https://t.co/aM9hxIj9E3
A pleasure to meet with Speaker of the House of Commons @LindsayHoyle_MP. Thank you for inviting me to the @CommonsSpeaker's residence & for being a firm friend to #Taiwan. https://t.co/8xRkOIGE4k

An honour to visit the House of Lords & meet with steadfast friends of #Taiwan from the British parliament. I'm so pleased to be in the #UK celebrating the partnership between our countries - a genuine expression of our shared democratic values. https://t.co/Pcv6DtcPSy

After addressing the Copenhagen Democracy Summit several times virtually, I was delighted to be here in person & to be welcomed by former PM @AndersFoghR Rasmussen. In my speech, I emphasized the importance of resilience in safeguarding democracy in #Taiwan & around the world. https://t.co/hrAUmK7P0G

Today I had the opportunity to visit the #Danish parliament & thank its members, including our long-time friend @Pia_Kjaersgaard, for supporting #Taiwan & our international participation. With all the progress we have made in recent years, I am confident that the partnership https://t.co/V8hRytKwxj

At Vilnius University, I spoke to former Lithuanian President Dalia @Grybauskaite_LT as well as students & faculty. My message: that democracies, big & small, should stand together to defend our values & hard-earned freedoms. https://t.co/nCxsheDgDG

These past two days, I've had the privilege of seeing the sights & learning about the history of Lithuania. I also had the chance to meet with Taiwanese students in Vilnius & bring them a taste of home. Being here to witness the #Taiwan-#Lithuania friendship has been inspiring. https://t.co/kaygbH0ktC

Wonderful to be here in Vilnius sharing a meal & excellent conversation with firm friends & supporters of #Taiwan from the #Lithuanian parliament. I’m deeply grateful to you all for standing with Taiwan & standing with democracy. https://t.co/eWdIYUWxji

Today I am heading to #Lithuania & #Denmark to meet with friends of #Taiwan & reaffirm our shared commitment to democratic values. During this trip, I hope to strengthen Taiwan’s relationships in Europe & encourage a deeper understanding of Taiwan globally. https://t.co/kYOy0jlzgG

I extend my heartfelt condolences to the Catholic communities in Taiwan and around the world on the loss of Pope Francis. His profound messages of peace and universal love resonated deeply with me and will live on through us all.

Taiwan's own Nymphia Wind @66wind99, looking incredible as always. I love seeing you share #Taiwan with the world, this time with some of our most emblematic wildlife like the Mikado pheasant and clouded leopard on your dress.
https://t.co/T6xHmKJn36

Former US Deputy Secretary of State Richard Armitage was a man of principle and a true friend of Taiwan. While he will be greatly missed, he will also be remembered for his commitment to democracy and for building bridges between democratic partners around the world. https://t.co/mk81JJVOpy
My heart goes out to everyone affected by the earthquake that struck Myanmar and Thailand today. I sincerely hope that the rescue and recovery efforts can help all those in need.

#Taiwan is proof that democracy can advance freedom & prosperity while fostering a greater global standing. This was my message to our international partners at the Taipei @HFXforum. https://t.co/QOHktfy1MT
また昭恵夫人を台湾でお迎えできるのはとても嬉しくおもいます https://t.co/iAETamhlzn

Along with President @ChingteLai & @JosephWuTW, I was proud to welcome the @HFXforum & friends from around the world to #Taiwan to experience our democracy firsthand. Working together, we can ensure security, strengthen our resilience, & safeguard our democratic way of life. https://t.co/uPXY6eodfJ

Happy #LunarNewYear to all those celebrating here in #Taiwan & around the world. Wishing you all a pleasant holiday spent with family & friends, & a successful Year of the Snake. https://t.co/eyG7oF2kVa

A pleasure to meet with an engaging group of future leaders - the students taking part in the @Harvard Kennedy School #Taiwan Trek. As a former university professor, I always enjoy speaking with students, especially about topics close to my heart like the value of democracy. https://t.co/HSOtIxAl45

My thoughts are with everyone affected by the wildfires in California & I extend my heartfelt condolences to all who have lost loved ones. I hope that everyone in the area is able to get to safety & for a swift end to the fires.

Wishing a Happy New Year to all our friends around the world. In the year ahead, I hope that #Taiwan continues its forward momentum & deepens its international friendships, & that you all enjoy a wonderful 2025. https://t.co/n1S3T4iRKY

Wishing a Merry Christmas to all those celebrating in #Taiwan & around the world. 

I hope you enjoy this time with family, friends, & festive cheer. https://t.co/F8pHrEghnV
My heart goes out to all those impacted by the earthquake in Northern California. I hope that all the communities affected recover quickly from any damage & stay safe.

At the @HFXforum, I spoke to parliamentarians from the US, Canada, Germany & the UK about their relations with #Taiwan & the global challenges we all face. I'm grateful to our friends in the international community for their support & look forward to expanding our partnerships. https://t.co/YStVlzcqLs

It was an honour to speak at this year's @HFXforum. Facing an increasingly complex international landscape, my message to the global democratic community was that we need to be more united than ever to ensure our security & protect our democratic way of life. https://t.co/R6ES6PqDmb

After meeting several times in #Taiwan, I was delighted & moved to see my old friend @JudySgroMP, & firm friend of Taiwan @KevinVuongMP, in #Canada. With friends like you, & a shared commitment to democracy, I'm confident our bilateral partnership will continue to flourish. https://t.co/2Fp4E2Ig6m

Thank you #Canada for the very warm welcome. While here, I'm looking forward to seeing more friends of #Taiwan & discussing our commitment to freedom, democracy, & security with the international community at the @HFXforum. https://t.co/ThPU81oHeP

For many people, when they think of Taiwan, they think of marriage equality. The road we took to achieve this was not easy, but it's a road we are proud to have walked down. Today, during #Taiwan Pride, we celebrate everyone's freedom to love.

📷 Taiwan Tongzhi Hotline https://t.co/UtujryBlzW

Grateful to the @Europarl_EN for adopting a resolution in support of Taiwan & our international participation. When democratic partners stand united, we are stronger. Thank you to our European friends for welcoming me so warmly & for standing with #Taiwan. https://t.co/Fb247pF45g
RT @MiriamMLex: Today @Europarl_EN has sent a clear message to the PRC: We will not tolerate distortion of UN Resolution 2758 and undermini…

During my visit to the European Parliament, I had the privilege of being welcomed by Vice President @pinapic. We are deeply grateful to all our friends in the @Europarl_EN for supporting #Taiwan's democracy, security & international participation. https://t.co/UIgMgfQ1OM

Meeting with European women leaders, I was heartened by their steadfast commitment to democracy & support for #Taiwan. Facing the rising threat of authoritarianism, women leaders stand at the forefront in upholding our democratic values & way of life. https://t.co/0RZ0BfN7se

Upon arriving in Brussels, I had the opportunity to meet at the @Europarl_EN with parliamentarians from across the continent. I thanked them for standing with us & emphasized the importance of #Taiwan to the international community. https://t.co/IFbZT9QBhu

Thank you to our friends in France for the warm welcome.

After this visit, I am even more confident that the #Taiwan-#France partnership will only continue to grow stronger. https://t.co/ys1u1U1LZe

No president can succeed without the help & support of their friends. Today, I had the pleasure of seeing good friends of mine & of #Taiwan from the French @Senat. Thank you all for standing by our side. We hope to see you in Taiwan soon. https://t.co/J1fceqgEGQ

I'm thrilled to be in #Paris & look forward to seeing more friends of #Taiwan. Here in #France, I will emphasise our shared values of freedom, democracy, & respect for human rights. https://t.co/YeONJTyplr

Being in #Prague has been an incredible experience with beautiful sites & engaging conversations. But most importantly, I was grateful to see so many friends old & new, & have been heartened by their support for #Taiwan. https://t.co/HYKw4MByeX

Great to see #Czech Chamber of Deputies Speaker @market_a again, this time in Prague. I am grateful to Speaker Adamova, who led a historic 160-person delegation to #Taiwan last year, for all she has done to bring our countries closer together. https://t.co/aqpRqg8RDx

Speaking at @Forum_2000 in #Prague this morning, my message to the international democratic community was clear: While we face immense challenges, by standing together & holding fast to our values,  we can safeguard our way of life & build a brighter future. https://t.co/gMlrym9zYa

On my first day in #Czechia, I had the pleasure of seeing a good friend of mine and of #Taiwan @Vystrcil_Milos at the opening of @Forum_2000. To be here, & hear the stories of courageous democracy advocates, is truly inspiring. https://t.co/2pPoeIW5vd

Today, I arrived in Europe to visit friends of #Taiwan & strengthen our relationships with fellow democracies. I'm delighted to be in #Czechia, one of our most steadfast European partners, for my first stop. https://t.co/OlSvGxhkyA

Ahead of my upcoming trip to Europe, I paid a visit to President @ChingteLai to discuss our international engagement. 

I look forward to seeing good friends & speaking at @Forum_2000 in #Czechia, & to sharing the story of #Taiwan’s commitment to democracy with the world. https://t.co/A0Px1U0U9s

When I met boxer Lin Yu-ting 林郁婷, I saw an athlete who is fearless in the face of challenges, whether they come from inside or outside the ring.
Today, when she represents #Taiwan on the Olympic stage, we will be behind her & all the Taiwanese Olympians making us proud. https://t.co/UfSqIqgSxC

Looking back on the past few years, I'm incredibly grateful for the people I was able to meet & for everyone's contributions to #Taiwan.

I'm proud to share this photo album, on the website of my office, with some of our most cherished memories together.
https://t.co/bQFSdrlmWP

Today I enjoyed an insightful conversation with the National Bureau of Asian Research. I want to thank @NBRnews for giving me the opportunity to share my thoughts on the challenges facing Taiwan & the region, & all the participants for their continued support for #Taiwan. https://t.co/AdnNSLKBJd
Congratulations to @Keir_Starmer on your election as PM. I look forward to seeing the #Taiwan-#UK partnership continue to go from strength to strength.

Always a pleasure to see old friends back in #Taiwan. Today I caught up with former #Australian representative Jenny Bloomfield, who made tremendous contributions to our bilateral partnership, & introduced her to a beloved family member 🐶. https://t.co/wIufSKyx9x

Wishing a happy Dragon Boat Festival to everyone in #Taiwan & all those celebrating around the world. I hope you enjoy this holiday with family, friends, & some delicious zongzi! https://t.co/MIQWOwuKfU

In my first meeting with a friend from Europe since stepping down as president, I was delighted to welcome former President @Grybauskaite_LT back to #Taiwan. It’s always a pleasure to see our #Lithuanian partners, as we continue to build on our countries’ growing friendship. https://t.co/FJbBwJvU3R

Wishing President @ChingteLai & Vice President @bikhim all the best as they enter office. I'm confident that they will lead #Taiwan to a better, brighter future. 

I also want to thank the Taiwanese people for their support throughout my time in office. Although no longer https://t.co/28X4uCurhh

My warmest thanks to all our guests here to celebrate the inauguration of President @ChingteLai & Vice President @bikhim, and support #Taiwan’s democratic achievements.

These past 8 years, we have truly created a Taiwan of the world. Now, confidently & as part of the global https://t.co/vWFUra22Z7

Happy to meet with President @SantiPenap on his latest visit for Inauguration Day. I’ve been delighted to see #Taiwan-#Paraguay bonds flourish, and am confident that under President-elect @ChingteLai’s leadership, our nations will continue to achieve great things together. https://t.co/oUf3EQ9Ttf

A pleasure to meet with Lord Rogan, Baroness D’Souza, @SarahChampionMP, Lord @RichardFaulkne8 & the other members with today’s delegation from the British-Taiwanese All-Party Parliamentary Group. On this special day, let me say thank you for your years of support for #Taiwan-#UK https://t.co/PqOtMzK7xm

Today, it was my honour to recognize Gerrit van der Wees, editor for 35 years of Taiwan Communiqué. By chronicling 80s & 90s Taiwan for an English readership, he made major contributions to our democratisation & relations with the #US. Thank you for giving lasting reminders of https://t.co/ZZUyYMjy7Y

I recently sat for an interview with @taiwanplusnews @taiwanplusshows for their documentary Taiwan in Transition. In it, I discuss our critical efforts for #Taiwan in the last eight years, including our response to the pandemic, receiving Nancy Pelosi on her visit, building a https://t.co/Cr0ooTQfHn

Delighted to see @66wind99 & fellow queens perform at the Presidential Office today. Nymphia, as the S16 winner of @RuPaulsDragRace, is now a queen for the world. We're all looking forward to you lighting up the stage with #Taiwanese pride at our pavilion at the Paris Olympics. https://t.co/E9Xt7tuRrc

For #MothersDay and every day, I want to say to moms everywhere: Caring for loved ones is hard work for any family, so thank you for everything you do. No matter what motherhood means for you, I hope you achieve all you aspire to. https://t.co/uFl8BdcAd3

Last night, I was honored to congratulate the recipients of the Human Rights Press Awards, which were hosted in Taiwan for the first time. As the democratic world faces increasing threats, #Taiwan will continue to stand up for media freedom & human rights. https://t.co/fIevlftKYE

Excited to share Taiwan Tourism’s new look, designed in a collab by Dentsu & Bito, whose founder is a Presidential Innovation Award winner. We warmly invite visitors to #Taiwan to experience #WavesOfWonder in our dynamic landscape & culture, as we greet a new wave of tourism. https://t.co/rV0QlA8nse
垂秀夫大使は台湾にとって長年の良き友人であり、台日関係深化の重要な立役者でもあります。本日、「大綬景星勳章」の授与を通して、私は台湾の人々を代表して、台日関係促進に寄与した垂大使の優れた功績に感謝しました。日本政府による台湾人旅客へのノービザ措置の実施から台日青少年交流の推進に至 https://t.co/drTk3JicCz
自民党青年局の鈴木貴子局長 @_SuzukiTakako_ をはじめとする青年局の皆さんとお会いできて大変嬉しく思います。 https://t.co/JkambTJdsW

As we mark Labour Day on May 1, we proudly recognise & thank this year’s national model workers from both home & abroad, including awardees from the 🇵🇭 #Philippines, 🇹🇭 #Thailand, 🇻🇳 #Vietnam, & 🇮🇩 #Indonesia. Your contributions across all sectors keep #Taiwan moving forward. https://t.co/FCYcytxheC

A warm welcome to the bipartisan delegation incl. Congressional Taiwan Caucus members @RepLisaMcClain, Rep @dankildee, & Rep @markalfordkc. Thank you for consistently backing #Taiwan & our ever-deepening partnership with the #US. https://t.co/WMY5pZrQ8T

Glad to see a delegation of our friends led by @CSIS Senior VP for Asia & Korea Chair @VictorDCha. We thank the members for supporting the #Taiwan-#US friendship as we work together to defend our shared values & maintain regional peace & stability. https://t.co/r0mfaIcIQo

Congratulations to you, Nymphia Wind @66wind99, for being so accomplished in the difficult art form of drag, and for being the first Taiwanese to take the stage and win on @RuPaulsDragRace. 

Right after being crowned queen, you said “Taiwan, this is for you.”
Taiwan thanks you

Wonderful to meet with the Lithuanian delegation led by former Vice-Minister of Foreign Affairs @Adomenas on his latest visit to #Taiwan. We’re delighted to see our partnership growing thanks to #Lithuania's years of support, as we work together to safeguard freedom & democracy. https://t.co/R9S4u5Z2KT

Today, as we in Taiwan come together and remember the atrocities of the Holocaust, we also remind ourselves that the threat of authoritarianism never truly goes away. That is why we honor days of remembrance like today’s and continue to reaffirm our vow of never again. https://t.co/DPCf8lEBz8

Lovely to meet the cross-party delegation from New Zealand led by @JosephMooneyMP & MP Ingrid Leary, & hear them perform a Māori song. We’re happy to see our ties grow closer, & we look forward to further collaboration in indigenous culture, green energy, & the digital economy. https://t.co/lqL7W7C8mk

Pleased to meet with Senate President @BetoOvelarANR & his delegation, incl. 2nd Senate VP @SenaHermelinda & Senator @pipodiazveron. #Taiwan & #Paraguay have worked on many fruitful projects recently; I'm sure our partnership will continue to benefit our peoples & be a model for https://t.co/XgcHbrRumA

A warm welcome to @VFWHQ Commander-in-Chief @duanesarm on his 1st visit to Taiwan & Exec. Dir. Ryan Gallucci on his return. We appreciate the VFW’s long-term support, for the #Taiwan-#US partnership & for the care of the veterans who have fought for our freedom & democracy. https://t.co/vwqw7KjXNg

A warm welcome to the cross-party delegation led by @ShayneNeumannMP & @AndrewWallaceMP, whose visit highlights #Taiwan & #Australia’s strong ties. We thank you for speaking up in support of Taiwan’s democracy, and look forward to expanding our bilateral exchanges. https://t.co/ywYkCQZhUi

We thank you for your condolences and your words of encouragement, Prime Minister @P_Fiala. Having support from our friends around the world like the Czech Republic gives us courage in this difficult time.
We are deeply touched by the support of Prime Minister @JohnBricenoBZE and all our friends in Belize. During this challenging time, your support helps us stand resilient in the recovery effort.

On behalf of the people of Taiwan, I extend our heartfelt gratitude to @Pontifex for his condolences and prayers. While we heal in the aftermath of the earthquake, we find comfort and strength in your spiritual closeness.
We are thankful, Prime Minister @Thavisin, for your generosity and condolences to everyone affected by the disastrous earthquake. It is heartening to know we have friends like Thailand at our side.
We deeply appreciate the condolences and well-wishes of Czech Speaker @market_a, and cherish your support during this time of hardship as we work to recover.

Our sincere gratitude to Seimas Speaker @VCmilyte for the condolences and words of encouragement. There remains much recovery work to be done in the coming days, and the Taiwanese people are keeping their spirits up thanks to messages from friends like you.
We thank you, @VjosaOsmaniPRKS, for your kind message and condolences. Support from friends like Kosovo keeps us going strong in the wake of the destruction caused by this earthquake.
岸田首相 @kishida230 がおっしゃるとおり、わたしたちは #海を接する隣人 であり、これまでも何度も手を取り合ってさまざな困難を乗り越えてきた、互いに支え合う堅実なパートナーです。
We are deeply grateful for your kind words and support, @narendramodi, at this challenging time. Your solidarity means a great deal to the people of Taiwan as we all work toward a swift recovery.

Thank you, @bongbongmarcos, for your heartfelt message following today’s earthquake. Response efforts are ongoing, and we will continue to do our utmost to protect the safety of all in Taiwan, including our Filipino community, as we recover and rebuild.
